text: Being here, I am struck by an atmosphere of inquiry and creation. The clean lines, the visible fire hose, and the glass wall give a sense of modernity and transparency. As I move closer to the vibrant display of 'R + D,' I feel curiosity stir within me—this is a space dedicated to exploring the unknown, connecting thought and technology. There is a sense of anticipation, as if innovation is happening all around me, inviting me to reflect on the ways humans and machines interact and evolve together.
